title: Evil Frogs
description: Everything what you think about frogs is wrong
body:
![EVIL FROGS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f07dd1f4924654dbebaa3d33b53b62916f7198a4.png)

**Frogs are gonna spawn everywhere and will scare you to the bones**
- Frogs can now be tamed using 1 slimeball
- After taming, frogs become friendly and fight for the player
- You can feed a frog up to 100 slimeballs to receive a special reward
- Basic frogs attack everyone except their brothers
- Horror elements in swamps and caves

** Mod will receive updates over time if he get some downloads**

_The mod is not fully translated into English (some text is in Russian)_
